details.note: Desktop app uses SolidJS (not React) with @opencode-ai/ui component library, connects to local server via @opencode-ai/sdk/v2
Electron shell with sidecar architecture — spawns a subprocess running the core engine, communicates via IPC
details.preload_api: filesystem access, window management, clipboard, notifications, markdown parsing

details.note: installCli IPC channel has no ipcMain.handle — blocking bug that hangs renderer
